data.title: Teacher's Day
data.description: We gathered around Professor Jang for Teacher's Day, sharing warm thanks for his steady guidance and care.

data.title: Year-Start Dinner
data.description: We welcomed the new semester with a cozy dinner together, catching up and starting the year with good energy.

data.title: CIKM 2025
data.description: Yujin presented a poster at the ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 2025) in Seoul, Korea. CIKM is a top-tier conference in data mining, and we were glad to share this work with the community.

data.title: ICMRI 2025
data.description: Professor Jang, Junho, Geonwoo, and Boseong presented their work at ICMRI 2025 in Seoul, Korea. Geonwoo received the Silver Award in Oral Presentation, and Boseong received the Silver Award in Poster Presentation. Congratulations to everyone on a meaningful and memorable conference!

data.title: ICCV 2025
data.description: Lab members attended the International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV 2025) in Honolulu, Hawaii. ICCV is a top-tier computer vision conference, and it was a special chance to learn, connect, and be inspired together.

data.title: Everland Day
data.description: We spent a cheerful day together at Everland, making room for laughter, photos, and a relaxed dinner after a busy season.

data.title: KCCV 2025
data.description: Lab members attended the Korean Conference on Computer Vision (KCCV 2025) on August 4-6.

data.title: Teacher's Day
data.description: We celebrated Teacher's Day with Professor Jang, sharing cake, smiles, and heartfelt gratitude for his thoughtful guidance.

data.title: Year-Start Dinner
data.description: We had a joyful gathering to celebrate the start of the new semester. Here's to a fresh start and success for everyone! 🎉

data.title: NeurIPS 2024
data.description: Jiwoong, Daehwan, and Junho attended the Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2024 in Vancouver, Canada. NeurIPS is one of the world's top AI conferences.

data.title: ICPR 2024
data.description: Junho attended the 27th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2024) in Kolkata, India, where he presented a poster. He looked great in traditional Indian attire!

data.title: Medical AI Competition
data.description: Jiwoong, Daehwan, and Junho participated in the 1st Medical AI Competition, organized by Korea University Medical Center, Korea University College of Medicine, and the Korea University BK21 Convergence Translational Medical Science Education Research Group. They achieved 3rd place and received the Korea University BK21 Convergence Translational Medical Science Education Research Group Award. Congratulations!

data.title: ICMRI 2024
data.description: Geonwoo, Seohyun, and Ikbeom attended the 12th International Congress on MRI & 29th Annual Scientific Meeting of KSMRM (ICMRI 2024) in Seoul, Korea. Geonwoo presented a poster.

data.title: Year-End Dinner
data.description: We had a gathering to wrap up the year 2024. Everyone worked hard this year—great job!

data.title: KCCV 2024
data.description: Nine lab members attended the 11th Korean Conference on Computer Vision (KCCV 2024) in Busan, Korea. We also enjoyed a yacht party together—it was a fantastic experience!

data.title: AI Grand Challenge
data.description: Junho (Team: 가이아) participated in the 2023 AI Grand Challenge: AI for Policy Support, organized by the Institute of Information & Communications Technology Planning & Evaluation (IITP). He won the Silver Award (IITP President’s Award). Congratulations!

data.title: BBQ Day
data.description: We had an outdoor barbecue day. The food was delicious!

data.title: Pizza Day
data.description: After a lab meeting, we ordered and enjoyed pizza together. Yummy!
